Ufuk Avrupa

Bilimsel Mükemmeliyet (Excellent Science)

1. Avrupa Araştırma Konseyi (European Research Council−ERC)

https://erc.europa.eu/

____________________

https://marie-sklodowska-curie-actions.ec.europa.eu/

____________________

https://rea.ec.europa.eu/funding-and-grants/horizon-europe-research-infrastructures_en

Küresel Sorunlar ve Endüstriyel Rekabet (Global Issues and Industrial Competition)

(v) Unlocking the full potential of new tools, technologies and digital solutions for a healthy society (Sağlıklı bir toplum için yeni araçların, teknolojilerin ve dijital çözümlerin tam potansiyeline ulaşmak),

https://ec.europa.eu/info/research-and-innovation/funding/funding-opportunities/funding-programmes-and-open-calls/horizon-europe/cluster-1-health_en

____________________

https://ec.europa.eu/info/research-and-innovation/funding/funding-opportunities/funding-programmes-and-open-calls/horizon-europe/cluster-2-culture-creativity-and-inclusive-society_en

____________________

3. Sivil Güvenlik (Civil Security for Society)

(i) Better protect the EU and its citizens against Crime and Terrorism (Suç ve Terör ile Mücadele),

(ii) Effective management of EU external borders (Sınır Yönetimi),

(vi) Strengthened Security Research and Innovation (Güvenlik araştırma ve inovasyon faaliyetlerine destek verilmesi).

https://ec.europa.eu/info/research-and-innovation/funding/funding-opportunities/funding-programmes-and-open-calls/horizon-europe/cluster-3-civil-security-society_en

____________________

(Digital, Industry and Space)

(i) Climate neutral, circular and digitised production (İklim nötr, döngüsel ve dijital üretim),

(iii) World leading data and computing technologies (Dünya lideri veri ve hesaplama teknolojileri),

(iv) Digital and emerging technologies for competitiveness and fit for the green deal (Rekabet ve yeşil mutabakata uygunluk için dijital ve gelişmekte olan teknolojiler),

(vi) A human-centred and ethical development of digital and industrial technologies (Dijital ve endüstriyel teknolojilerin insan merkezli ve etik gelişimi).

https://ec.europa.eu/info/research-and-innovation/funding/funding-opportunities/funding-programmes-and-open-calls/horizon-europe/cluster-4-digital-industry-and-space_en

____________________

5. İklim, Enerji ve Mobilite (Climate, Energy and Mobility)

(i) Climate sciences and responses for the transformation towards climate neutrality (İklim Nötr Dönüşüme Yönelik İklim Bilimleri ve Müdahaleleri),

(v) Clean and competitive solutions for all transport modes (Tüm ulaşım modları için temiz ve rekabetçi çözümler),

https://ec.europa.eu/info/research-and-innovation/funding/funding-opportunities/funding-programmes-and-open-calls/horizon-europe/cluster-5-climate-energy-and-mobility_en

____________________

6. Gıda, Biyoekonomi, Doğal Kaynaklar, Tarım ve Çevre (Food, Bioeconomy, Natural Resources, Agriculture and Environment)

(i) Biodiversity and ecosystem services (Biyoçeşitlilik ve Ekosistem Servisleri),

(ii) Fair, healthy and environmentally-friendly food systems from primary production to consumption (Birincil Üretimden Tüketime Kadar Adil, Sağlıklı ve Çevre Dostu Gıda Sistemleri),

(iii) Circular economy and bioeconomy sectors (Döngüsel Ekonomi ve Biyoekonomi Sektörleri),

(iv) Clean environment and zero pollution (Temiz Çevre ve Sıfır Emisyon),

(vii) Innovative governance, environmental observations and digital solutions in support of the Green Deal (Yeşil Mutabakat Yararına İnovatif Yönetim, Çevresel Gözlemleme ve Dijital Çözümler).

https://ec.europa.eu/info/research-and-innovation/funding/funding-opportunities/funding-programmes-and-open-calls/horizon-europe/cluster-6-food-bioeconomy-natural-resources-agriculture-and-environment_en

____________________

https://ec.europa.eu/info/departments/joint-research-centre_en

1.
